_meta.note: Synthetic patient, no PHI. To be reviewed by a licensed pharmacist for plausibility before demo. Med list intentionally in Spanish (LATAM pharmacist workflow) with one brand name to exercise normalization.
_meta.scenario: Heart failure + atrial fibrillation patient at hospital discharge on anticoagulation, with an interacting antiarrhythmic and an antibiotic started at discharge.

note: Paciente de 72 anos, insuficiencia cardiaca con fraccion de eyeccion reducida y fibrilacion auricular. Alta hospitalaria tras descompensacion. Se inicia amiodarona por FA de reciente diagnostico y cotrimoxazol por ITU. Anticoagulado con warfarina de larga data. Control de INR pendiente.
